
[both layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F6 main.tex — \pagenumbering{roman} overrides template's arabic default (required: \pagenumbering{arabic} (template's default))
      fix: Remove the page-numbering override; UF requires arabic numerals centered at bottom (cls:179-188). `\pagenumbering{arabic}` is fine.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f6--page-numbering-arabic-bottom-center

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.
